problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
hypothesis: Combining Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
